positive: A central, intricate celestial map composition featuring stylized constellations, glowing nebulae dust trails, and geometric lunar phases. The design should be rendered in a highly contrasting, minimalist linework style mixed with deep indigo and cosmic sapphire watercolor splashes. Emphasis on clean, vector-like silhouettes and perfect symmetry, suitable for a repeating print pattern. Composition must be centered and highly detailed, evoking a sense of magical wonder and deep space exploration. Glowing elements should provide dramatic backlighting against a deep midnight blue background. --ar 1:1 --style graphic --v 6.0
